metadata.description: Code review for AI-assisted development — catches runtime failures that pass compile time, learns your preferences with Bayesian uncertainty, judges quality with a debiased LLM rubric.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all 7 Lich sub-plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: mantis-core
plugins.description: M1 Cousot Interval Propagation + M2 Falleri Structural Diff. The static-analysis substrate that flags division-by-zero, null deref, OOB, overflow via abstract interpretation, and isolates semantic edits via GumTree AST diffing. Paired with lich-sandbox (M5) for confirmation.

plugins.name: mantis-preference
plugins.description: M6 Bayesian Preference Accumulation. Per-(developer, rule) Beta-Binomial posteriors updated on accept/reject signals; Thompson-sampled surfacing with a 5% minimum floor (no rule dies permanently from accumulated rejections). The Gauss Accumulation pattern, academically grounded.

plugins.name: mantis-python
plugins.description: Python language adapter for Lich. Maps ruff rule IDs (~900 rules) into M-engine outputs and contributes Python-specific idiom rules (pyupgrade modernization, typing, async-await patterns, list/dict comprehensions). At launch: ~120 of ruff's 900 rules mapped; remaining tagged as Phase 2 coverage gap.

plugins.name: mantis-rubric
plugins.description: M7 Zheng Pairwise Rubric Judgment. 5-axis LLM-as-judge scoring (Clarity, Correctness-at-glance, Idiom-fit, Testability, Simplicity) with position-swap debiasing and Cohen's Kappa inter-judge reliability. Catches style/idiom/clarity signals static engines miss. Sonnet default judge; Haiku under Pech budget pressure; Opus for disagreement adjudication.

plugins.name: mantis-sandbox
plugins.description: M5 Bounded Subprocess Dry-Run. Confirms M1-flagged runtime-failure candidates by executing witness inputs in a stdlib-only sandbox (resource.setrlimit for CPU/AS/NOFILE/FSIZE + signal.alarm for wall-clock). Unix-only at launch; Windows skips M5 with platform-unsupported verdict.

plugins.name: mantis-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript / JavaScript language adapter for Lich. Maps biome rule IDs (~423 rules) into M-engine outputs and contributes TS-specific idiom rules (React hooks exhaustive deps, JSX a11y, narrow-type-guards, any-avoidance). At launch: ~80 of biome's 423 rules mapped; remaining tagged as Phase 2 coverage gap.

plugins.name: mantis-verdict
plugins.description: Cross-engine verdict synthesizer. Composes M1/M2/M5/M6/M7 outputs into DEPLOY/HOLD/FAIL verdicts per the threshold contract in CLAUDE.md. Publishes lich.review.completed events (Phase 2) or writes to verdict.jsonl (Phase 1). Sylph's pre-commit gate subscribes; FAIL refuses auto-commit.
